action.reasoning: Observation: iter 13 eval exprate=0.0, exprate_le2=0.0, despite 15 epochs of training with preprocessing fixes. Previous models also zero exact match. Analysis: model may be generating gibberish or failing to learn meaningful token sequences. The training loss 4.6 is high (close to random log 4.9), indicating weak learning. Need to debug pipeline: check if beam search outputs sensible tokens on training data, verify teacher forcing and shift in training loop, consider deeper encoder and better decoder setup. Decision: write a debug script to run inference on a few training samples and print predicted vs. ground truth tokens, to diagnose prediction quality. Then based on findings, overhaul architecture (full DenseNet, correct training loop).
